meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for unique — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly, use validWhen/invalidWhen/impact for rapid triage, and only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: Vulnerable Code Pattern
cards.detect: // ❌ CRITICAL: No access control on callback
check: VERIFY: // CRITICAL: No access control on callback
PROVE: TransferHelper.safeTransferFrom(token1, source, address(pool), amount1Owed);
cards.antipattern: TransferHelper.safeTransferFrom(token1, source, address(pool), amount1Owed);
cards.validWhen: // CRITICAL: No access control on callback

cards.title: 1. Transient Storage (EIP-1153) Authorization Bypass via CREATE2
cards.detect: EIP-1153 introduced `tstore`/`tload` opcodes for transient storage that persists only within a single transaction.
check: VERIFY: EIP-1153 introduced tstore/tload opcodes for transient storage that persists only within a single transaction.
PROVE: Create fake ERC20 tokens (AttackerC_A, AttackerC_B) with malicious mint() that returns uint160(address(this)); Create a fake Uniswap V3 pool using these tokens
ANTIPATTERN: Transient storage used for callback authorization
cards.antipattern: Transient storage used for callback authorization
cards.validWhen: EIP-1153 introduced tstore/tload opcodes for transient storage that persists only within a single transaction.

check: VERIFY: When a token's _transfer() function applies fees based on a percentage list where sum(shares) > 100%, the sender is debited more tokens than the...
PROVE: Flash loan USDT; Buy the buggy token from the pair (large amount)
ANTIPATTERN: transactionFee() splits fees by unbounded percentages
cards.antipattern: transactionFee() splits fees by unbounded percentages
cards.validWhen: When a token's _transfer() function applies fees based on a percentage list where sum(shares) > 100%, the sender is debited more tokens than the recipient receives.

cards.title: 5. Bonding Curve Arithmetic Overflow in Price Calculation
cards.detect: Bonding curve contracts calculate buy/sell prices using polynomial formulas.
check: VERIFY: Bonding curve contracts calculate buy/sell prices using polynomial formulas.
PROVE: Read bonding curve parameters: reserve, THETA, totalSupply; Solve: $\text{amount} = \sqrt{\frac{\text{type(uint256).max}}{100 \times \text{reserve}} +...
ANTIPATTERN: Bonding curve price formula overflows at extreme amounts
cards.antipattern: Bonding curve price formula overflows at extreme amounts
cards.validWhen: Bonding curve contracts calculate buy/sell prices using polynomial formulas.

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: VaultRouter.deposit() accepts arbitrary swap routing data
check: VERIFY: VaultRouter.deposit() forwards arbitrary swapData to the ParaSwap aggregator without restricting which pools can be used as routing targets.
PROVE: VaultRouter.deposit() accepts arbitrary swap routing data
cards.antipattern: VaultRouter.deposit() accepts arbitrary swap routing data
cards.validWhen: VaultRouter.deposit() forwards arbitrary swapData to the ParaSwap aggregator without restricting which pools can be used as routing targets.

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: buyItem allows quantity=0, resulting in zero payment
check: VERIFY: buyItem() calculates totalPrice = _quantity * _pricePerItem without requiring _quantity > 0.
PROVE: Token has broken fee mechanism creating phantom balance
cards.antipattern: Token has broken fee mechanism creating phantom balance
cards.validWhen: buyItem() calculates totalPrice = _quantity * _pricePerItem without requiring _quantity > 0.

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: migrate() accepts arbitrary token0/token1 without validating against pair
check: VERIFY: migrate() doesn't validate that token0/token1 match pair.token0()/pair.token1().
PROVE: migrate() accepts arbitrary token0/token1 without validating against pair
cards.antipattern: migrate() accepts arbitrary token0/token1 without validating against pair
cards.validWhen: migrate() doesn't validate that token0/token1 match pair.token0()/pair.token1().

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: msg.value checked per vault in a loop
check: VERIFY: exercise() iterates over multiple vaults and checks msg.value >= ethCost per iteration.
PROVE: SushiMiso DutchAuction batch() forwards msg.value to each sub-call
cards.antipattern: SushiMiso DutchAuction batch() forwards msg.value to each sub-call
cards.validWhen: exercise() iterates over multiple vaults and checks msg.value >= ethCost per iteration.

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: Only seller signature validated, buyer address is caller-controlled
check: VERIFY: fillSellOrder() only validates the seller's signature.
PROVE: Only seller signature validated, buyer address is caller-controlled
cards.antipattern: Only seller signature validated, buyer address is caller-controlled
cards.validWhen: fillSellOrder() only validates the seller's signature.

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: Pair.skim() with fee-on-transfer token creates exploitable reserve gap
check: VERIFY: GSS token has a transfer fee.
PROVE: Pair.skim() with fee-on-transfer token creates exploitable reserve gap
cards.antipattern: Pair.skim() with fee-on-transfer token creates exploitable reserve gap
cards.validWhen: GSS token has a transfer fee.

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: Global sellAmount variable is inflated by buys, reduces burn on sells
check: VERIFY: sellAmount global variable is accumulated by buy transactions without any cap, decay, or per-address tracking.
PROVE: Global sellAmount variable is inflated by buys, reduces burn on sells
cards.antipattern: Global sellAmount variable is inflated by buys, reduces burn on sells
cards.validWhen: The sellAmount global variable is accumulated by buy transactions without any cap, decay, or per-address tracking.

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: Metapool swap rate depends on base pool state
check: VERIFY: Saddle's metapool swaps use a virtual price derived from its base pool LP token.
PROVE: Metapool swap rate depends on base pool state
cards.antipattern: Metapool swap rate depends on base pool state
cards.validWhen: Saddle's metapool swaps use a virtual price derived from its base pool LP token.

cards.title: Cross-Contract Reentrancy Allows YIELD_TOKEN Theft in Multi-Vault ERC4626 Systems
cards.detect: The `WithdrawalRequestManager.stakeTokens()` function captures the initial `YIELD_TOKEN` balance **before** executing a...
check: VERIFY: WithdrawalRequestManager.stakeTokens() function captures the initial YIELD_TOKEN balance before executing a potentially reentrant trade operation...
PROVE: *Prerequisites; WithdrawalRequestManager manages multiple vault strategies
FALSIFY: Balance snapshot after all external calls
IMPACT: Inflated Share Minting: Attacker receives more vault shares than their deposit value
LOOK FOR: Balance snapshot before external calls: balanceOf() ... externalCall() ... balanceOf()
cards.antipattern: Only validates first and last tokens, not middle path
cards.securePattern: Balance snapshot after all external calls
cards.validWhen: The WithdrawalRequestManager.stakeTokens() function captures the initial YIELD_TOKEN balance before executing a potentially reentrant trade operation (_preStakingTrade).
cards.invalidWhen: Balance snapshot after all external calls
cards.impact: Inflated Share Minting: Attacker receives more vault shares than their deposit value

cards.title: Flash Loan Vault Deflation Attack: Draining Accumulated Yield via Share Price Reset
cards.detect: Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using:
check: VERIFY: Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using
PROVE: *Prerequisites; ERC4626 IBT vault with accumulated yield (share price > 1)
FALSIFY: Prevent borrowing amounts that could empty underlying vault
IMPACT: Share Price Reset: Vault's share price forcibly returned to default value
Does the protocol offer flash loans of ERC4626 shares?
Can the flash loan drain the entire underlying vault?
cards.antipattern: Allows borrowing entire IBT supply without rate protection
cards.securePattern: Prevent borrowing amounts that could empty underlying vault
cards.validWhen: Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using
cards.invalidWhen: Prevent borrowing amounts that could empty underlying vault
cards.impact: Share Price Reset: Vault's share price forcibly returned to default value
